item.ptxt: The windshield wiper and washer system consists of wiper and washer switch, windshield wiper motor and windshield washer pump.
The rear wiper and washer system consists of BCM, wiper and washer switch, rear wiper motor and rear washer pump.

servinfosub.title: Wiper and Washer Switch
servinfosub.ptxt: The wiper and washer switch has the following wiper positions: “LO” (steady low speed operation), “HI” (steady high speed operation) and “INT” (interval operation). In addition to the above, there is the “MIST” position, which allows the wipers to operate at a low speed while the wiper and washer switch is held in this position.

servinfosub.title: Wiper Motor
servinfosub.ptxt: Operation of the rear wiper motor is controlled by BCM.
